description:
Powerful desktop PDF solution to create and edit PDF documents and integrate with Foxit eSign.


New Features and Improvements in Foxit PDF Editor Subscription Release 2026.1.0.36452
- New features and enhancements for AI Assistant
  - Provide an Action Inspector feature that analyzes JavaScript actions in documents when users open them, and promptly alerts users to potential risks if detected.
  - Add the Chats tab on the Start page of Foxit PDF Editor to help users easily manage their AI chat history for different documents.
- Add an option to hide the cursor while drawing with the Pencil tool on tablet type devices to enhance the stylus editing experience and resolve pressure sensitivity issues.
- With the text highlighting option enabled in Preferences, the Pencil tool highlights text when drawing over it and draws freehand when used on blank areas of a document.
- Allow users to enable Overprint Preview for accurate rendering of overprint effects, ensuring correct visual output for print‑production PDFs.
- Enhance the Preflight feature to support converting an entire PDF to grayscale with a single action. (Pro only)
- Support enterprise deployment through Foxit Customization Wizard or Group Policy, allowing administrators to hide/show export formats in the Save As dialog box and enable the Foxit eSign feature to access the internet even when internet access is disabled for all other features.
- Other enhancements to the user experience.
Issues Addressed in Foxit PDF Editor Subscription Release 2026.1.0.36452
- Fixed some security and stability issues. Click here for details.
